description: Unit test suite for the ScrollBar helper class, testing scrollbar visibility, width calculations, style adjustments, and restoration behaviors within a DOM environment.

classes.name: ScrollBarHelper
classes.description: A helper class for managing scrollbar behaviors, including measuring scrollbar width, checking overflow, and adjusting element styles to compensate for scrollbar presence.

methods.name: isOverflowing
methods.description: Determines if the document body is overflowing, i.e., if a scrollbar is present.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Computes and returns the width of the scrollbar currently present.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the scrollbar by adjusting styles and stores original styles for reset.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Restores the styles of elements to their original state before scrollbar adjustments.
